query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph of bright cumulus clouds billowing across a dark sky, with a rectangular traffic sign displaying a white upward-pointing arrow positioned in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photograph of bright cumulus clouds billowing across a dark sky, with a rectangular traffic sign displaying a white upward-pointing arrow positioned in the lower right corner. The image exhibits heavy film grain throughout the frame, exposure extremes that blow out the brightest cloud masses to nearly pure white while crushing the sky to deep black, and obstructed cropping that cuts off the bottom and right edges of the sign.
